REFERENCES

Yeast techniques

1.  Guthrie, C., and G.R. Fink 1991 Guide to yeast genetics and
molecular biology. Methods in Enzymology vol 194. Acedemic Press Inc.

2.  Ausubel, F.M., R. Brent, R.E. Kingston, D.D. Moore, J.G. Seidmen,
J.A.  Smith, and K. Struhl. 1987-1993 Current Protocols in Molecular
Biology, Greene Publishing Associates.

Yeast transformation

1.  Gietz, D., A. St. Jean, R.A. Woods, and R.H. Schiestl 1992 Nucleic
Acids Research 20:1425
